---
name: Refactoring
about: Improve internal code quality without changing behavior (rename, restructure, simplify, remove duplication)
labels: refactoring
assignees: ''
---

## What needs to change

Describe the current code and why it is problematic (e.g. duplication, poor naming, unnecessary complexity).

## Proposed change

What the refactored state looks like. Include any rename mapping if applicable.

| Current | Proposed |
|---------|----------|
|         |          |

## Risk of regression

Which parts of the codebase may be affected and how to verify nothing breaks.

## Additional context

Related issues, prior discussions, or anything else relevant.
